name: Walt Disney

acts.description: Named as friendly HUAC witness in 1947; provided names of suspected Communist sympathizers in the industry
Violently broke the 1941 animators' strike; fired organizers and blacklisted union members
Credible allegations of antisemitism documented by multiple contemporaries and biographers

behavior_summary: HUAC informant who named colleagues. Broke unions and blacklisted workers. Multiple biographers document antisemitism. Also built arguably the most influential entertainment company in history.

notable_works: Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs
art.summary: Invented the animated feature film and built a cultural empire that shaped the imagination of essentially every subsequent generation.

verdict.blurb: Invented childhood magic for the 20th century and ratted out his employees to a congressional witch hunt. The castle is real; so is the HUAC transcript.
